scope.assignment: IAM user or role in one AWS account
scope.resource_assumption: Thesis-managed resources use the Digital Twin name/deployment suffix where Terraform supports naming constraints.
scope.region_assumption: Primary deployment region plus IAM Identity Center region for Managed Grafana.

source_artifacts.contains: Statement[].Sid scope classification and pre-E2E least-privilege notes

conditions.reason: Several Terraform resources are created before stable ARNs exist. Stage 2 keeps broad-but-bounded resource statements explicit for thesis-demo-v1 and hardens them in least-privilege-v2.
Terraform-managed aws_cloudwatch_log_group resources are represented in the checker and AWS bootstrap policy.

known_gaps.reason: AWS resource-level support differs per service/action and some create APIs require wildcard resources. The source policy keeps this visible and is guarded by tests.

known_gaps.area: Amazon Managed Grafana / IAM Identity Center
known_gaps.reason: Managed Grafana setup depends on IAM Identity Center availability and still needs supervised cloud validation.

verification.live_smoke: Run only during supervised cloud validation; default automated tests must not mutate AWS.
